channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bin with rotting rubbish left on corner of Essenden and Berkhampstead, 10th March
item.description:
This green bin full of rotting waste has been left on the corner of Essenden Road and Berkhampstead Road. I think vermin have been in it. It has also started to smell according to residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Essenden Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 10th March
item.description:
Someone dumped a suitcase in Meadowcourt Road on Sunday 8 March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowcourt Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken shards of glass, 10th March
item.description:
On pavement footpath as shown.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abadoned empty BT box, 10th March
item.description:
Contact BT to remove this unfunctional boxes, who is responssible for this??????

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Browning Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road signs wearing out- can't see name of the close properly, 10th March
item.description:
The sign is eroded so you cannot properly see which road the sign refers to

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prospect Close, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bad potholes, 10th March
item.description:
Road surface badly in need of repair - centre of road around 15m long
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Tollington Park, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface in poor condition in many places, 10th March
item.description:
Many potholes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aycliffe Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 wooden paletts dumped, 10th March
item.description:
Next to special school, occured often from opposite company

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farmers Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oil Spillage, 10th March
item.description:
Oil Spillage outside 40 Marina Drive, Welling
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marina Drive, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Behind Green Box, 10th March
item.description:
Between my neighbours and our house is a green electric box on the footpath, people are throwing there dog waste in bags behind there. There is around 10bags already, being in bio bags, they will break and then the smell and flies ect will come. we need a solution to stop this happening and it needs clearing up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wendover Way, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 10th March
item.description:
Two potholes within 10 yards increasing danger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Oakfield Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Front of Special school, pavement blocked, 10th March
item.description:
A lots of black bags dumped on pavement, clear ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farmers Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole - quite deep, 10th March
item.description:
Been here since November (possibly before)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Oakfield Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag dumped in middle of road, 10th March
item.description:
A bag full of waste is currently in the middle of the road I would remove it myself but I’m unable to lift it. This is causing vehicles to swerve to miss it and is very dangerous. The frustrating thing is over the last 30 minutes at least 15 of your vehicles have just driven around it. Can this be removed asap before it causes an accident
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southlands Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 large/deep potholes outside 1A Hartham Road N7 (white house), 10th March
item.description:
5 large and deep potholes with large aggregate strewn across the road outside 1A Hartham Road N7. Cobbles underneath exposed and danger of large loose stones being flung up when driven over. Also causing noise & vibration when lorries drive into it, causing vehicle damage and danger to cyclists. Please rectify.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartham Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded Road marking lines, 10th March
item.description:
As detailed…
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Highcombe, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two pot holes, 10th March
item.description:
Two pot holes at Bus stand, one is exposing metal rods, outside Number 31 Kiss the hippo coffee shop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Margaret Street, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal camping or living, 10th March
item.description:
We have people living in a tent in an open space where children a women walk dogs exercise alone. There are no washing or toilet facilities in the park and this could lead to local people being exposed to flashing etc.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radial Path, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint pot dumped. Junction of Wendover Rd and Rochester Way, 10th March
item.description:
Paint pot dumped junction of Wendover Rd and Rochester Way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Failed pothole repair in middle of road at junction of Hillmarton Road & Cardozo Road N7, 10th March
item.description:
Failed pothole repair in middle of road at junction of Hillmarton Road & Cardozo Road N7. Cobbles underneath exposed and causing noise & vibration when lorries/busses drive into it, vehicle damage and danger to cyclists. Please rectify.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Hillmarton Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
